title: ThorHandoffIntake
description: Schema for Thor Handoff Intake — maps Thor-Agent-Kit concepts and protocols to Odin contracts. External reference and local guidance only, not a runtime bridge.

intake_id.description: Unique identifier for this Thor handoff intake record

thor_source_ref.description: URL or reference to the Thor-Agent-Kit source repository

thor_commit_sha.description: Git commit SHA of the Thor-Agent-Kit version used as reference

thor_command_refs.description: Thor CLI commands referenced (not executed) during intake

thor_repo_cognition_refs.description: Thor repo cognition documents referenced during intake

thor_protocol_refs.description: Thor protocol documents referenced during intake

odin_bundle_ref.description: Odin bundle this intake maps to

odin_work_packet_ref.description: Odin work packet or handoff document this intake supports

mapping_summary.description: Summary of how Thor concepts map to Odin contracts

used_concepts.description: Thor concepts adopted and mapped into Odin

not_used_concepts.description: Thor concepts not used or not applicable in this intake

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary — what this intake does and does not prove

candidate_only.description: Must be true — intake is external reference and local guidance, not runtime proof

non_claims.description: Explicit list of things this intake does not claim or prove
